name: Two CTA Buttons Added to Hero
prompt: Add two buttons to the hero section on my home page: one that says 'Book a Demo' and links to /contact, and another that says 'See How It Works' and links to /about.

checks.judge: The homepage hero section displays both 'Book a Demo' and 'See How It Works' as clickable buttons with the correct href values

dry_run.text: I've added both buttons to your homepage hero: 'Book a Demo' linking to /contact and 'See How It Works' linking to /about.

edits.content/pages/index.mdx:
---
title: Home
description: Welcome to our site
---

<Hero
  heading="Welcome to Our Business"
  subheading="Discover how we can help you succeed"
  actions={[
    { label: "Book a Demo", href: "/contact", variant: "primary" },
    { label: "See How It Works", href: "/about", variant: "secondary" }
  ]}
/>
